title: cleyera mexicana
intro: Cleyera mexicana, also known as the Mexican Evergreen or Cleyera, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Theaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleyera mexicana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating wounds, and herbal preparations such as teas and infusions can be made by boiling the leaves and roots in water.
